changeSet.author: MohamedFouad
changeSet.sql:
CREATE TABLE product_template (
id BIGSERIAL PRIMARY KEY,
name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
product_type VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL, -- product / service / consumable
company_id BIGINT,
category_id BIGINT,
uom_id BIGINT NOT NULL,
purchase_uom_id BIGINT,
sale_uom_id BIGINT,
weight NUMERIC(12,3), volume NUMERIC(12,3),
active BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE,
CONSTRAINT fk_product_category FOREIGN KEY (category_id) REFERENCES product_category(id),
CONSTRAINT fk_product_uom FOREIGN KEY (uom_id) REFERENCES uom(id),
CONSTRAINT fk_purchase_uom FOREIGN KEY (purchase_uom_id) REFERENCES uom(id),
CONSTRAINT fk_sales_uom FOREIGN KEY (sale_uom_id) REFERENCES uom(id) );
-- CREATE INDEX idx_template_name -- ON product_template USING BTREE (name);
CREATE INDEX idx_template_name_trgm ON product_template USING GIN (name gin_trgm_ops);
CREATE INDEX idx_template_company ON product_template (company_id);
CREATE INDEX idx_template_uom_group ON product_template (uom_group_id);
